name: Pumpkin Layer Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine graham cracker crumbs and melted margarine in a small mixing bowl. Press into a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Prepare the cream cheese layer: In another mixing bowl, combine softened fat-free cream cheese, 1 tablespoon skim milk, granulated sugar, and Cool Whip Lite® until smooth. Spread evenly over the crust.
4. Prepare the pumpkin layer: In a separate mixing bowl, whisk together cold skim milk, vanilla pudding mix, 3-3/4 cups pumpkin, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, 1 teaspoon ginger, and 1/2 teaspoon cloves until well combined.
5. Pour the pumpkin mixture over the cream cheese layer.
6. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or until set.
Note:
Per serving: 247 Calories; 5g Fat (18% calories from fat); 5g Protein; 45g Carbohydrate; 2mg Cholesterol; 417mg Sodium
